passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. Nos. 1-28) In each of the following questions, a related pair of figures (original pair) is followed by five numbered pairs of figures. Out of these five, four have relationship similar to that in the original pair. Only one pair of figures does not have similar relationship. Select that pair of figures which does not have a relationship similar to that in the original pair. The number of that pair is your answer.

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: Original Pair [Figure shows two boxes with vertical lines and dots] Answer Pairs [Five pairs of boxes labeled (a) through (e) with various arrangements of vertical lines]

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: [Figure shows original pair with crosses and geometric shapes] Answer Pairs [Five pairs of boxes labeled (a) through (e) with various geometric arrangements]

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: [Figure shows original pair with letter-number combinations] Answer Pairs [Five pairs of boxes labeled (a) through (e) with various letter-number combinations]

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: [Figure shows original pair with various symbols including circles, triangles, and other shapes] Answer Pairs [Five pairs of boxes labeled (a) through (e) with different symbol arrangements]

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: [Figure shows original pair with curved arrow-like symbols] Answer Pairs [Five pairs of boxes labeled (a) through (e) with various curved arrow arrangements]

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: [Figure shows original pair with curved and angular shapes] Answer Pairs [Five pairs of boxes labeled (a) through (e) with various curved and angular arrangements]

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: [Figure shows original pair with horizontal lines and dots] Answer Pairs [Five pairs of boxes labeled (a) through (e) with various arrangements of horizontal lines and dots]
